name: Potato Pancakes and Apple Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pare raw potatoes, grate, and squeeze out liquid through cheesecloth.
2. Add eggs, salt, grated onion, and mix thoroughly.
3. Melt lard in a skillet and fry small, thin pancakes until crisp on both sides.
4. Serve with chilled apple sauce, creme fraiche, and watercress.
